== Notes for [[Item:Q108250|Q108250]] ==

lk. 929 (317H).
--------------------
49. AHMAD.ALMUHAJIR-10.
was born in 260h, Basrah, Iraq and died in 345h, Hasys, Yamen.
Youngest child.
Reference Link: http://freepages.family.rootsweb.ancestry.com/~naqobatulasyrof/main/des/d10.htm#i16
Reference Link: http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/a/s/y/Naqobatul-Asyrof-Jakarta/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0016.html

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001490201032

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
